titleStmt.title: SII 18.135: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 135. (B.K. No. 15 of 1933-34.) BANNIKOP, SHIGGAON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in front of the temple of Bhīma.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Bhūlōkamalladēva is dated in the 55th year of his reign Sādhāraṇa, Kārtika ba. Chaturdaśī, [Saturday]. The week-day is expressed by the single syllable Sau which apparently is an abbreviation of Saurivāra (Saturday). The regnal year 55 is a mistake either for 5 of the king's reign or 55 of the reign of his predecessor Vikramāditya VI. In either case it coincides with the cyclic year Sādhāraṇa. The details correspond to A.D. 1130, November 1, Saturday.
It records a grant of land made by Daṇḍanāyaka Holakēsidēva to the god Bhīmēs11vara of Banniyūr (modern Bannikop, the findspot of the record). The grant was entrusted to Amṛitarāsi-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namaḥ tuṁgasiraḥcuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trayiḷōkyanakarāraṁbhamūlasthaṁbha
ya saṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhi
rājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatbhūlōkamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkasthāyivaraṁ saluttamire tatpāda
padmōpajīvi . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpracaṁḍadaṁ
ḍanāyakaṁ holakēsi dēvaru śrīmaccāḷukyabhūlōkavarṣadaThere is a blank space left here for
55 neya sādhāraṇa saṁvatsarada kārttika bahu 4 caturdda
si sauvāradaṁdu banniyūra tīrtthada śrībhīmēśvaradēvara nivēdyakkendu
biṭṭaru ḍūra dāriyiṁ mūḍaṇa doḍḍa huṇuseya puri
mūḍalu yare mattaloṁdu perjjone paḍuvaṇa koḷadoḷaga
ṇa gadde kamma nūṟu tīrtthadiṁ teṁka kamma mūnūṟu tīrtthadiṁ mū
ḍa kamma mūnūṟu Antu mattaleraḍu śrī matu holakēsidēvaṁ śrī
bhīmēśvaradēvara tīrtthamaṁ miṁdu dēvadarśana nivēdyakke Amritarā
sipaṇḍitargge pūrvvādhāra koṭṭaṁ . yintī dharmmavanāva
nōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisidaṁge vāraṇāsi gurukṣētra prayā
gārgghyatīrtthadalu sāsira kavileya kōḍumaṁ koḷagumaṁ
śuvarṇnadalu kaṭṭisi sāsirvvarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge yu
bheyamukhidānamaṁ koṭṭa phaḷamakku . yī dharmmamanā
rāno Aḷidavargge Ā tīrtthadalā brāhmaṇaranā kavileyuma(ṁ) naḷida
pātakanaku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vvā yō harēti vasundharā śaṣṭhi
rvvārṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . Intī dharmmasa
ma taḷaṟa kēsiyaṇnana putra barmmayanā
ya kēteyanāyakaṁ siṁgagāvuṇḍaṁ samastapra
jege maṁ śrībhīmēsvaradēvargge pratipaḷisuvaru . © ©
go putra mmarasiya putra [Amrita]rāsipaṁḍitargge ho
lakēsi ṭṭaru soṁṭige sahitaṁ . I dharmma kōlu koḷaga saha
Digital edition of SII 18.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
